title: From Entrepreneurial Exploitation to Building At Scale

current_reality.occupation: Small business owner - restaurant, shop, service business, contractor
current_reality.daily_life: Work 60-80 hours/week, manage employees, deal with regulations, barely profitable
current_reality.earnings: $40k-$100k/year after expenses (less than employees per hour)
current_reality.actual_situation: Own business but trapped - can't sell, can't close, can't escape
current_reality.extraction: Taxes, regulations, insurance, rent, suppliers, banks - extracted from all sides
current_reality.soul_cost: Entrepreneur dream became prison - work more than employees, earn less per hour, can't leave
current_reality.future: Work until health fails, sell for less than invested, die having built nothing scalable

immediate: Work 70 hours/week - more than any employee
Earn $60k/year - less per hour than employees you pay $40k
Can't take vacation - business fails without you
Regulations crushing - permits, licenses, inspections, fees
Bank extraction - loan payments, credit card fees, payment processing
Supplier extraction - markup on everything, forced to specific suppliers by contracts
Insurance extraction - liability, property, health, workers comp - $2k+/month
the_trap: Can't sell - business unsellable (too dependent on you)
Can't close - invested too much, owe too much
Can't scale - regulations, capital requirements, competition from corporations
Can't escape - trapped by sunk cost and ongoing obligations
Working harder than employees - but called 'owner' so expected to sacrifice
deeper: Independence is illusion - dependent on banks, suppliers, regulations, landlord
Can't innovate - regulations prevent it, capital requirements too high
Competing with corporations - they have scale, you have exhaustion
Employees resent you - think you're rich (you're poorer than them per hour)
Family suffering - never home, always stressed, business consuming life
existential: Built business that's prison not freedom
Work harder than wage slaves, earn less freedom
Die chained to business, never scaled, never escaped
Children won't take over - they see your suffering, want corporate jobs instead
Legacy: Small business that dies with you, helped no one, created nothing lasting
Entrepreneurial spirit crushed by parasitic ecosystem

immediate_provisions.freedom: Close business - you're not trapped anymore
immediate_provisions.purpose: Build at SCALE finally - 8M km², $12T project, 100M workers

SCALE without capital requirements - mission provides resources
no_parasitic_extraction: No bank loans - mission funded, you don't borrow

Ratio: 138x better + work less hours + at scale

Invest in others - be the angel investor you needed, fund entrepreneurs

Retire - proved yourself at scale, mission complete, rest wealthy
